characters.name: Marcus Vance
characters.mask: A mid-level, brain-dead 'code monkey' content with simple Jira tickets.
characters.trueNature: A brilliant, perfectionist L9 Architect who is deeply offended by technical incompetence and feels a moral responsibility to fix broken systems.

characters.name: Richard Sterling
characters.mask: A decisive, high-powered CEO in control of his company.
characters.trueNature: An insecure, performative leader who relies on buzzwords and lacks actual technical understanding or crisis management skills.

characters.name: Evelyn Vance
characters.mask: A cold, aristocratic, and ruthless VC board member.
characters.trueNature: A pragmatic opportunist who values results and talent over corporate hierarchy and protocol.

pressureChoices.pressure: The company's database is failing, and the CEO is about to make a catastrophic error.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Stay hidden as an L3 and maintain his peaceful, anonymous life.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Intervene, fix the system, and blow his cover as a former L9 Architect.
pressureChoices.chosen: Intervene, fix the system, and blow his cover as a former L9 Architect.

pressureChoices.pressure: Evelyn offers him the Chief Architect role after he reveals his identity.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Refuse the role and return to his quiet life, leaving the engineers to fail.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Accept the role, sacrifice his anonymity, and fix the company's technical debt.
pressureChoices.chosen: Accept the role, sacrifice his anonymity, and fix the company's technical debt.

dimensions.positive: takes responsibility to save the team from failure
dimensions.negative: attempts to hide his talent to avoid the burdens of leadership

dimensions.positive: maintains the appearance of a powerful CEO
dimensions.negative: displays total ignorance of the technical crisis he oversees

emotionalMoments.trigger: successfully centering a div on his monitor
watching the company's poor architecture and the CEO's incompetence

desires.consciousDesire: To live a simple, stress-free life as a low-level developer.
desires.subconsciousDesire: To be in a position where he can exercise his mastery and fix broken systems.

desires.consciousDesire: To maintain control and look competent in front of the board.
desires.subconsciousDesire: To be validated as a successful leader despite his lack of substance.

desires.consciousDesire: To fix the company's backend and protect her investment.
desires.subconsciousDesire: To surround herself with the highest level of talent to ensure dominance.
